recommendations.title: Aziz Ansari: Live at Madison Square Garden

recommendations.title: Date and Switch
recommendations.overview: Two guys who make a pact to lose their virginity before prom find their friendship tested when one of them comes out of the closet.

recommendations.title: Aziz Ansari: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: Standup comedian Aziz Ansari ("Parks and Recreation") headlines his third standup special, where he shares his uniquely hilarious perspective on fears of adulthood, babies, marriage, and more. Ansari's look at life on the cusp of 30 years old is smar

recommendations.title: Alpha and Omega
recommendations.overview: Two young wolves at opposite ends of their pack's social order are thrown together into a foreign land and need each other to return home, but love complicates everything.

recommendations.title: Aziz Ansari: Right Now
recommendations.overview: In a comedy special directed by Spike Jonze, Aziz Ansari shares deep personal insights and hilarious takes on wokeness, family and the social climate.

recommendations.title: Comedy Central Roast of James Franco
recommendations.overview: It's James Franco's turn to step in to the celebrity hot seat for the latest installment of The Comedy Central Roast.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Hot Fuzz
recommendations.overview: Former London constable Nicholas Angel finds it difficult to adapt to his new assignment in the sleepy British village of Sandford. Not only does he miss the excitement of the big city, but he also has a well-meaning oaf for a partner. However, when

recommendations.title: The Prophecy II
recommendations.overview: The archangel Gabriel returns to try to destroy the human race he despises so much, with the help of a suicidal teen and the opposition of the angel Danyael.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.
